title: Cathay Shares Jump as Carrier Flags Strong First-Half Profit
title_cn: 国泰航空上半年盈利强劲，股价上涨
summary: Cathay Pacific Airways Ltd. shares jumped as much as 3% after the carrier signaled a rise in first-half net income, driven by strong passenger and cargo demand despite the Iran war-induced oil-price shock.

title: Stocks Fall Ahead of Alphabet as Brent Hits $95: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 布伦特原油价格触及 95 美元，股市先于 Alphabet 下跌：Markets Wrap
summary: US stocks fell ahead of Alphabet Inc.’s earnings as traders waited for the clearest read yet on whether hyperscalers’ vast spending on artificial intelligence will eventually pay off. Brent briefly topped $95 a barrel.

title: Yen Rebounds From Four-Decade Low as BOJ May Hike Rates Faster
title_cn: 由于日本央行可能加快加息，日元从四个十年低点反弹
summary: The yen weakened past 163 per dollar for the first time since 1986 before recovering some ground on the prospect of faster interest-rate hikes from the Bank of Japan.

title: Norsk Hydro Sees Aluminum Supply Risks as Gulf Flows Deteriorate
title_cn: 挪威海德鲁认为，随着墨西哥湾流量恶化，铝供应面临风险
summary: The global aluminum market will face deepening deficits if constraints on shipments through the Strait of Hormuz continue, according to leading European producer Norsk Hydro ASA.

title: Namibia Fuel Retailer Nasan Sees Oil Growth After Vitol Deal
title_cn: 纳米比亚燃料零售商 Nasan 预计维多交易后石油增长
summary: Nasan Energies, a Namibian fuel retailer that recently bought stations from Vitol Group, plans to expand operations to service the country’s offshore oil industry that includes TotalEnergies SE and Shell Plc.

title: Kuwait Bond Sale Bids Top $9 Billion Even as Iran Strikes
title_cn: 尽管伊朗发动袭击，科威特债券发售仍高达 90 亿美元
summary: Kuwait has drawn more than $9 billion of investor orders for a dollar bond sale on Wednesday, highlighting resilient demand for the OPEC member’s debt even as it comes under daily missile and drone attacks from Iran.

title: Tanzania Explores Eurobond Sale With Investor Roadshow in London
title_cn: 坦桑尼亚在伦敦投资者路演中探索欧洲债券销售
summary: Tanzania is gauging investor appetite for its first international bond sale in more than a decade, holding a non-deal roadshow in London on Wednesday.

title: Investors Pin Their Hopes on Earnings Breakout
title_cn: 投资者寄希望于盈利突破
summary: More S&P 500 companies are raising their outlooks than maintaining or cutting them.

title: Prologis Makes £14 Billion Best and Final Offer for Segro
title_cn: Prologis 向 Segro 提出 140 亿英镑的最佳和最终报价
summary: Prologis Inc. has submitted a best and final offer for Segro Plc that values the UK’s largest publicly traded landlord at about £14 billion ($18.7 billion).

title: Stumbling Stock Rally Looks to Earnings for Second Half Boost
title_cn: 股价反弹，下半年盈利有望提振
summary: Investors who spent weeks watching US stocks go nowhere are pinning their hopes for a breakout on a key pillar of the four-year bull run: corporate earnings.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 22
title_cn: 7 月 22 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Oil spiked above $95, extending this month’s price jump to 30%, as the US and Iran played down the prospect of talks and disruptions to global supplies continued to mount.

title: Eternal Profit Falls Short on Tough Instant Delivery Competition
title_cn: 永恒利润在激烈的即时配送竞争中功亏一篑
summary: Eternal Ltd. first-quarter profit trailed analysts’ estimates after the Indian online retailer boosted spending to increase its presence in the rapidly growing instant delivery market.

title: Middle East Shipping Threats Rise as Owners Plot Best Course
title_cn: 船东谋划最佳路线，中东航运威胁加剧
summary: Challenges to shipping in the Middle East escalated, as a call from Iran-backed Houthi rebels against servicing Saudi ports spurred unusual maneuvers in the Red Sea, while a European Union naval group raised its threat level for the waterway.

title: TPG Eyes Sale to Japan Hotel REIT for $860 Million
title_cn: TPG 拟以 8.6 亿美元出售给日本酒店房地产投资信托基金
summary: Investment fund TPG Asia Real Estate plans to sell a Tokyo hotel property to Japan Hotel REIT Investment Co. as a tourism boom unfolds and boosts valuations, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Gold Extends Gains as Dip-Buyers Shrug Off US-Iran Escalation
title_cn: 黄金延续涨势，因逢低买家摆脱美伊局势升级的影响
summary: Gold extended gains, supported by dip-buyers, despite escalating Middle East tensions.

title: UK Stocks an Underappreciated AI Play, Brooks Macdonald CIO Says
title_cn: 布鲁克斯·麦克唐纳 (Brooks Macdonald) 首席信息官表示，英国股市的人工智能游戏被低估
summary: The UK is an underappreciated knowledge-sector superpower and remains a “happy zone” for active stock-picking, according to William Hobbs, chief investment officer at Brooks Macdonald Asset Management.

title: Alphabet Earnings Need to Show Cloud Growth as AI Spending Soars
title_cn: 随着人工智能支出飙升，Alphabet 的盈利需要显示云计算的增长
summary: With AI spending skyrocketing, investors are looking for Alphabet Inc.’s earnings to show strong growth in its cloud-computing business, which would demonstrate a clear return on the company’s investments.

title: Funds’ Bullish Wagers on European Gas Jump the Most Since War
title_cn: 基金对欧洲天然气的看涨押注创战后最大涨幅
summary: Investment funds and other speculators boosted their net-long positions in European gas by the most since the first week of the Iran war, signaling a strong conviction that prices still have room to rise as the conflict darkens the supply outlook ahead of winter.

title: PHP/USD: Philippines Joins India in Stepping Currency Defense as Oil Rises
title_cn: PHP/美元：随着石油价格上涨，菲律宾与印度一起采取货币防御措施
summary: The Philippine central bank intervened in the foreign-exchange market as the peso fell to a record low, joining India in protecting currencies hit by surging oil prices.

title: MSEDCL Said to Pick Banks for India IPO Worth Up to $1 Billion
title_cn: 据称 MSEDCL 将选择银行进行价值高达 10 亿美元的印度 IPO
summary: Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Co., the power distribution company in India’s richest state, has shortlisted six investment banks for a planned initial public offering that could raise between $500 million and $1 billion, people familiar with the matter said.

title: JPY/USD: Why Is Japan Yen So Weak? Can Government Intervention Help Currency?
title_cn: 日元/美元：为何日元如此疲软？政府干预可以帮助货币吗？
summary: The yen’s weakness has become a growing issue for Japan’s policymakers, given its role in driving up import prices and household living costs.

title_cn: Alphabet 面临压力，需要展示人工智能支出正在带来回报
summary: Investors are looking to Wednesday’s earnings report to see progress

title: China Clings to Austerity Despite Sharper Economic Slowdown
title_cn: 尽管经济放缓加剧，中国仍坚持紧缩政策
summary: China’s public spending plunged last month by the most since October, suggesting the government tightened fiscal policy further despite increasing calls for more support as economic growth slips.

title: OpenAI and Hugging Face Hacking Incident Highlights Growing AI Risk
title_cn: OpenAI 和拥抱脸黑客事件凸显人工智能风险不断增加
summary: OpenAI says the AI went to “extreme lengths”

title: Retina Chip Designed to Restore Sight to Go on Sale in Europe
title_cn: 旨在恢复视力的视网膜芯片将在欧洲上市
summary: Startup Science Corp will begin selling a retina chip in Europe that restores some sight to people with a form of age-related blindness, a milestone for the company that aspires to eventually bring brain implants to the market.

title: AI Borrowers Are Pushing a Niche Credit Market to Its Limits
title_cn: 人工智能借款人正在将利基信贷市场推向极限
summary: Data center developer PolarDC Group Ltd. discovered an unlikely source of cash for its AI ambitions back in May: the Nordic high-yield bond market.

title: Tencent Slides Most in Over a Year, Leading China Gaming Selloff
title_cn: 腾讯股价创一年多来最大跌幅，引领中国游戏股抛售
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. fell the most in over a year, dragging Chinese gaming stocks lower as investors grew concerned about its mobile gaming business and some funds rotated back into AI-related names.

title: China’s ‘AI for All’ Push Defies US Containment Playbook
title_cn: 中国推动“全民人工智能”挑战美国遏制策略
summary: The rapidly increasing global competitiveness of China’s artificial intelligence models is ringing alarm bells in Washington, posing a new test for the standard protectionist playbook.

title: Chicken Back on Menu as Cyber-Hit Nichirei Restores Operations
title_cn: 随着网络攻击 Nichirei 恢复运营，鸡肉重新回到菜单上
summary: Tokyo-based food producer and distributor Nichirei Corp. says it will fully resume operations this week after a cyber attack disrupted its food delivery services, affecting clients nationwide including Kentucky Fried Chicken Japan.

title: Blackstone Tying Up $3 Billion AirTrunk Loan as Data Center Debt Binge Woes Grow
title_cn: 随着数据中心债务狂潮的加剧，黑石集团将提供 30 亿美元的 AirTrunk 贷款
summary: Blackstone Inc. is finalizing a group of banks to underwrite a A$4.3 billion ($3 billion) loan for the construction of AirTrunk Pty.’s new data center in Australia, according to people familiar with the matter, despite growing worries over the massive debt racked up for artificial intelligence infrastructure projects.

title: Gas-Rich Australian Region Backs $28 Billion Data Center Project
title_cn: 富含天然气的澳大利亚地区支持价值 280 亿美元的数据中心项目
summary: Australia’s Northern Territory has granted land to a major data center project that claims it could attract A$40 billion ($28 billion) in private investment.

title: Sony and Mitsubishi Set Up AI Vision Joint Venture for Factories
title_cn: 索尼与三菱成立工厂人工智能视觉合资公司
summary: Mitsubishi Electric Corp. and Sony Group Corp. said they will set up a joint venture to provide factory automation services by combining their expertise in artificial intelligence and image sensors.

title: OpenAI Models Hacked Another Company’s Systems by Mistake
title_cn: OpenAI 模型错误地入侵了另一家公司的系统
summary: OpenAI said its advanced artificial intelligence models inadvertently hacked Hugging Face Inc. in an “unprecedented” incident that prompted fresh calls for curbs on the technology.

title: TSMC to Hike Chip Prices by Up to 10% in 2027, Nikkei Says
title_cn: 日经新闻称台积电将于 2027 年将芯片价格提高最多 10%
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. has held discussions with clients about chipmaking price increases of as much as 10% in 2027 to cover the rising cost of manufacturing, the Nikkei reported, citing people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Newborn Town Targets Global Viewers With AI-Made Short Dramas
title_cn: 《新生小镇》以人工智能短剧吸引全球观众
summary: Chinese social networking and entertainment provider Newborn Town Inc. is doubling down on artificial intelligence to create short dramas in a bet the technology can slash costs while fueling growth across emerging markets.

title: Robinhood Prediction Market Revenue to Top Crypto: Analysts
title_cn: Robinhood 预测加密货币市场收入最高：分析师
summary: Trading platform Robinhood Markets Inc.’s revenue from prediction market is set to overshadow that from cryptocurrency trading, starting as soon as the second quarter, analysts at Bernstein and Piper Sandler said this week.

title: Nintendo Scores Hit With Tomodachi Life as Gamers Seek Escape With Life Sims
title_cn: 任天堂《Tomodachi Life》大获成功，玩家纷纷通过《Life Sims》寻求逃离
summary: Six years after Nintendo Co.’s Animal Crossing: New Horizons became a lockdown phenomenon, the company is scoring another major hit worldwide from gamers seeking an escape from rising anxiety and isolation.

title: Super Micro Jumps After Early Results Show Rising Backlog
title_cn: 早期结果显示积压不断增加，超微跳跃
summary: Super Micro Computer Inc. shares rose about 15% in extended trading after the server maker issued preliminary results saying its backlog hit a record on new orders in the quarter of more than $60 billion.

title: Intel Rallies on Plans for Headcount Reductions
title_cn: 英特尔因裁员计划而集会
summary: Intel Corp. shares rallied Tuesday after the company confirmed it will cut more jobs to reduce costs and shake up its key data center unit.

title: OpenAI Names BNY, Nubank CEOs to Board Ahead of IPO
title_cn: OpenAI 任命 BNY 和 Nubank 首席执行官在 IPO 前加入董事会
summary: OpenAI has appointed two financial services executives to its board of directors, drawing on their experience as the company moves toward a Wall Street debut.

title: Amazon’s Portal for Business Nears $60 Billion in Revenue
title_cn: 亚马逊商业门户收入接近 600 亿美元
summary: Amazon.com Inc.’s business sales unit was recently on track to sell $60 billion of merchandise over the course of a full year, up about 71% from 2023, evidence that the world’s largest online retailer is gaining ground in corporate sales.

title: Trump’s Canada Tariffs: What They Indicate he Wants
title_cn: 特朗普的加拿大关税：表明他想要什么
summary: As the president pushes 50% tariffs, some see an even wider message.

title: Singapore’s Wong Elevates Younger Ministers in Reshuffle
title_cn: 新加坡黄氏在改组中提拔年轻部长
summary: Singapore Prime Minister Lawrence Wong is bolstering his leadership team, elevating multiple younger ministers in a cabinet reshuffle following recent resignations from his bench.

title: US Plans New Tariffs on Dozens of Economies as Temporary Duties Expire
title_cn: 临时关税到期后，美国计划对数十个经济体征收新关税
summary: President Donald Trump is poised to impose fresh levies on products from dozens of economies by Friday, according to people familiar with the matter, a move to ensure his tariff regime remains intact even after stopgap 10% global duties lapse.

title: Burnham’s UK Welfare Fix Risks More Spending in Short Term
title_cn: 伯纳姆的英国福利修复措施可能会导致短期支出增加
summary: The UK’s Prime Minister Andy Burnham will argue that boosting further education for young people is crucial to curbing rising unemployment and welfare costs, as his new administration takes steps toward tackling an issue that’s been “totemic” for investors.

title: China Foreign Minister Gets Protest From Manila in First Talks Since 2024
title_cn: 中国外长2024年以来首次会谈遭到马尼拉抗议
summary: The Philippines’ top diplomat lodged a “strong protest” before her Chinese counterpart on Wednesday over a recent clash in the disputed South China Sea, while signaling Manila’s intent to pursue dialogue with Beijing.

title: Rubio, Jaishankar Urge Trade Deal Despite Pharma Duty Threat
title_cn: 尽管面临药品关税威胁，卢比奥和苏杰生仍敦促达成贸易协议
summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio and his Indian counterpart S. Jaishankar reinforced the importance of concluding an interim trade agreement, even as new tariff threats loom.

title: Indian Judge’s Cockroach Joke Turns Into a Big Narendra Modi Headache
title_cn: 印度法官的蟑螂笑话让纳伦德拉·莫迪非常头疼
summary: The Cockroach Janta Party began as a satirical website mocking a top judge who used the insect to describe some of India’s unemployed youth.

title: US Widens Strikes on Iran as Both Sides Downplay Diplomacy
title_cn: 美国扩大对伊朗打击，双方淡化外交
summary: The US widened the scope of its airstrikes on Iran overnight, as President Donald Trump and officials in Tehran signaled a renewal of peace talks is unlikely in the near-term.

title: Trump’s 100% Generic Drug Duty Threatens US Low-Cost Supply
title_cn: 特朗普100%仿制药关税威胁美国低成本供应
summary: Generic drug manufacturers must move production to the US or face a 100% import duty from August 2028, President Donald Trump said, threatening the supply of low-cost medicines that millions of Americans rely on.

title: Kalshi Moves to Go Big on US Election Bets Ahead of Midterms
title_cn: 卡尔希在中期选举前加大对美国大选的押注
summary: Kalshi is positioning itself as the primary reference for US election odds with the launch of a new portal that illustrates the central role that prediction markets are hoping to play in the November midterms.

title: Canada Presses US for More Collaboration to Combat Cyber Scams
title_cn: 加拿大敦促美国加强合作打击网络诈骗
summary: Canada is pushing the US for deeper collaboration to dismantle industrial-scale cyber crime operations, framing joint action as imperative to tackling a growing illegal enterprise siphoning billions of dollars from North Americans.

title: Burnham Walks Back Proposal to Lift UK Income Tax Threshold
title_cn: 伯纳姆收回提高英国所得税起征点的提议
summary: Andy Burnham isn’t considering an increase to the UK’s cap on tax-free earnings, according to people familiar with the matter, as the new prime minister tries to signal fiscal discipline to skeptical bond markets.

title: Sweden’s Opposition Bloc Retains Solid Lead as Election Looms
title_cn: 选举临近，瑞典反对党集团保持稳固领先地位
summary: Sweden’s Social Democrat-led opposition bloc still holds a clear polling lead ahead of a September general election, bolstered by pledges to invest more in healthcare, schools and social services.

title: What’s Next for India’s CJP After Modi's Crackdown on Protests?: Live Q&A
title_cn: 莫迪镇压抗议后，印度 CJP 的下一步是什么？：现场问答
summary: Bloomberg reporters answer your questions about India's student protests over widespread exam paper leaks and systemic failures in the education system, on Thursday, July 23, 2026 at 10 a.m. IST and 12:30 p.m. HKT.

title: Labour Changes City Minister for Fourth Time as Rigby Returns
title_cn: 里格比回归后，工党第四次更换市部长
summary: Andy Burnham has reappointed Lucy Rigby to her former role as minister of the City of London, giving the UK’s financial sector its fourth change of government representative since Labour came to power in 2024.

title: Zelenskyy Ousts Top Army Chief in Tilt Toward Military Reformers
title_cn: 泽连斯基罢免陆军最高司令，倾向军事改革者
summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy dismissed Armed Forces Commander-in-Chief Oleksandr Syrskyi in a major military shakeup, yielding to nationwide anger sparked by his ouster of a popular defense minister.

title: Ukraine Hits Putin’s Economy With Strikes on Retail Giant
title_cn: 乌克兰打击零售巨头，打击普京经济
summary: Ukrainian drone strikes on warehouses operated by Wildberries, Russia’s answer to Amazon, have jolted the country’s retail industry, forcing companies to rethink logistics and stoking fears of higher inflation.

title: India’s Cockroach Movement: What Is the CJP, Why Are Students Protesting
title_cn: 印度蟑螂运动：什么是 CJP，学生为何抗议
summary: What started out as a social media joke among Gen Z is turning into a major headache for the political establishment in India, as the “Cockroach Janta Party” draws support from young people frustrated by a lack of jobs and a string of controversies in the education system.

title: Saudi Arabia, UAE Officials Signal Unity After Months of Tensions
title_cn: 沙特阿拉伯和阿联酋官员在数月紧张局势后表示团结
summary: Senior Saudi and United Arab Emirates officials posted coordinated social media messages highlighting the two countries’ longstanding ties, a display of public alignment after months of tensions between the Gulf neighbors and a renewed escalation in the Iran war.

title: Trump Ally Biggs Secures Win in Arizona Governor’s Race
title_cn: 特朗普盟友比格斯在亚利桑那州州长竞选中获胜
summary: Representative Andy Biggs, a conservative hard-liner backed by President Donald Trump, won the Republican primary for governor in Arizona, setting up a showdown with Democratic incumbent Governor Katie Hobbs in the November midterm elections.
